title: CI: 700-play.bats: huge cleanup, with goal of making parallel-safe
body:
The short version: use unique pod/container/image names in
all kube tests. Also, eliminate all "podman rm anything -a" in tests,
and any tests that expect "ps -a" to be empty.

The long version: trying to review this as one blob. It will not go well.

The Goldilocks version (I hope): I've split this into six commits, each with a
general theme. Each of those is pretty long, but their content is fairly repetitious
hence easier to review.

```release-note
None
```
